raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Assemblywoman Cottie Petrie-Norris has introduced AB 1057, which will allow for the seizure of ghost guns when an emergency Gun Violence Restraining Order (GVRO) is served.",
    "Law enforcement will be able to confiscate untraceable, handmade guns in addition to traditional licensed firearms when a person is deemed by the court to be a threat to themselves or others.",
    "Ghost guns are homemade guns made from parts that are readily available and unregulated.",
    "Ghost guns can be bought without a background check and are not built by licensed manufacturers.",
    "31% of guns recovered in California were unserialized, untraceable ghost guns.",
    "In Los Angeles, 41% of guns recovered were unserialized, untraceable ghost guns.",
    "More than 2,500 ghost guns were connected to criminal activity in 114 Federal cases from 2010 through April 2020.",
    "AB 1057 updates the definition of seizable firearms to include ghost guns for GVROs."
  ]
}
```
